mapper.select: SELECT holding_id as holdingId, card_id as cardId, fin_id as finId, discontinued, card_name as cardName, res_card_no as resCardNo, res_sleep_yn as resSleepYn, res_card_type as resCardType, res_traffic_yn as resTrafficYn, res_image_link as resImageLink, res_issue_date as resIssueDate, res_valid_period as resValidPeriod, res_state as resState, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, user_id as userId, connected_id as connectedId FROM mydata_card_holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId}
